task_description: Implement Sprint 1 features: Feature 5 (Export Validation Report in CSV/JSON/HTML with CLI flag and GUI button) and Feature 9 (Row-level Approved Status with Entry model extension, Phase 4 UI, Phase 5 skip logic, Excel/STF persistence, and CLI commands)

verification.summary: All 148 tests pass (114 original + 17 for FEAT-001 + 16 for FEAT-002 + 1 fix test). GUI tests pass with offscreen platform. Two semantic review iterations resolved all confirmed issues.
